title: Ofcom's Online Safety Act section 128 annual report: 2025
text:
Ofcom
’s annual report on how we use our technology notice functions under section 128 of the 
Online Safety Act
 to remove online terrorism and/or child sexual abuse (
CSEA
) content.

This report was laid before Parliament and covers the legal framework, work carried out in 2025, and next steps following the consultation that closed in March 2025.

Ofcom annual report on notices to deal with terrorism and/or CSEA content: 2025

Ref: ISBN 978-1-5286-6153-9, E03515473

Unnumbered act paper
